_meta.leakage: as-of argument date; no post-decision inputs
_meta.note: 2nd real institution category; includes a NON-VOTING timing/deadline dimension

decision_dimension.note: a case is decided for the MAJORITY of participating justices (majVotes>minVotes)

reversal_regularity.institutional_fact: cert is granted mostly to REVERSE — SCOTUS reverses ~2/3 of merits cases

timing_dimension_non_voting.note: the Court's term-deadline institution: argued cases are decided before the term ends (~end of June) — a real DEADLINE / capacity-constrained-docket dimension (non-voting)
